title: ZenSpace Chrome Extension
description: A productivity-focused Chrome extension offering real-time dashboards, a badge timer, ambient soundscapes, and secure note-taking via Firebase.

title: Finance Tracker Architecture
description: A robust, scalable finance tracking application tailored for managing personal budgets and freelance income with automated KPI calculation.

title: Student Records Database
description: A comprehensive database management application built with Java to handle student records, grades, and enrollments securely.

title: Loopster
description: A dynamic social networking platform allowing users to share updates, media, and interact with loops of content seamlessly.

title: BrainMaster Quiz App
description: An interactive and engaging quiz application designed to test knowledge across various topics with real-time scoring and feedback.

title: Walk Saver
description: A health and fitness application designed to track steps, monitor walking routes, and encourage a healthier lifestyle.

title: WatchDoodie Movie App
description: A sleek movie database and tracking application providing users with trending films, reviews, and detailed cast information.

title: Inventory System
description: An enterprise-level inventory management system to track stock levels, orders, and sales with comprehensive reporting tools.

title: ResumeIQ
description: A premium resume building application featuring an interactive AI Copilot, ATS keyword matrix, and high-performance glassmorphism design.
